threads.formatted_text:
--- Thread (1 messages, 2021-02-01) ---
[2021-02-01 18:21] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): good all times nostalgia:

--- Thread (1 messages, 2022-07-10) ---
[2022-07-10 17:33] spiritfryer (Spyrfyr): > The Engine of Memes hums, and ages come and pass, leaving memories that become legend. Legend fades to myth, and even myth is long forgotten when the Age that gave it birth comes again. In one Age, called the Gen Alpha by some, an Age yet to come, an Age long past, a meme rose in the Prismata Discord. The meme was not the beginning. There are neither beginnings nor endings to the humming of the Engine of Memes. But it was _a_ beginning.

messages.author: spiritfryer
messages.content: > The Engine of Memes hums, and ages come and pass, leaving memories that become legend. Legend fades to myth, and even myth is long forgotten when the Age that gave it birth comes again. In one Age, called the Gen Alpha by some, an Age yet to come, an Age long past, a meme rose in the Prismata Discord. The meme was not the beginning. There are neither beginnings nor endings to the humming of the Engine of Memes. But it was _a_ beginning.
